mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rm_user ( user_id, pw, name, birth, email, phone, education, skill, desired_job, desired_area ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{pw}, #{name}, #{birth}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{education}, #{skill}, #{desiredJob}, #{desiredArea} )
mapper.update: UPDATE rm_user SET pw = #{pw}, name = #{name}, birth = #{birth}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, education = #{education}, skill = #{skill}, desired_job = #{desiredJob}, desired_area = #{desiredArea} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
